description: Wear these cute socks with trainers when you're working out. adidas ensures that all their products are designed to offer the best performance and these socks are no exception.Made of 69% cotton, 29% nylon and 2% elastaneSmall rib at opening to grip below ankle with narrow stripeThree dimensional shaped heel and toe for best FitBranding printed on the socksSock careMachine wash in warm water below 40 degrees using a mild detergentDo not iron, bleach, tumble dry or dry clean
